description: Example CI runtime profile for self-hosted 1C contour with canonical dbms-infobase ibcmd block
notes: Этот preset показывает shape для dbms-infobase contour.
DBMS-backed contour является safety-sensitive, если целевая БД обычно принадлежит cluster-managed topology.
По умолчанию core capabilities оставлены на designer; перевод на ibcmd делайте осознанно и только при operator-owned isolation.

xunit.unsupportedReason: CI xUnit contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

bdd.unsupportedReason: CI BDD contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

smoke.unsupportedReason: CI smoke contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

publishHttp.unsupportedReason: CI publish contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.
